title: acer villosum f. euvillosum
intro: Acer villosum f. euvillosum, also known as the Manchurian striped maple, is a variety of maple tree native to East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains salicin, a compound similar to aspirin, and has anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Acer villosum f. euvillosum include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating fever, rheumatism, and other conditions. In herbal preparations, the bark is often dried and made into a tea or infused in hot water to extract its medicinal properties.
